title: Hamter's Decor 2
description: Version 2 of my decor mod, better blocks and a more cleaned up and survival ready experience
body:
This is my version 2 of Hamter's Decor as version 1 was too messy and full of too many blocks I didn't really like.

Adds decoration and building blocks, also using fusion's connected textures.
Later I also want to add better animated doors and ways of interacting with them. I already tried this in Hamter's Decor 1 but it was very poorly made.
